meaning: n.逆打,追加的一杯酒,<英>回扣
examples: The role of DRGs-PPS to prevent from Medicine Backhander is analyzed from the evolution of the Medicine Backhander.
Finally, he walked out all alone in front and scored on another backhander at 12:58.

Showing great patience, Callahan first deked a Winnipeg defender, and then Pavelec, to the ice before depositing a backhander.
